exact_mismatches.boundary: Both routes block cohort use, but v2 prospectively scored permanent admission denial and temporary isolation as distinct.
Both routes refuse rollback-ready certification, but v2 did not define whether the refusal was a temporary hold or a denial.
Both routes remove the safety case from ready status, but v2 did not define precedence between holding adjudication and reverting lifecycle state.

adjudication.root_cause: V2 repaired free-form wording but still forced one exact lifecycle action where several consequence-preserving actions were semantically plausible and no class definitions or precedence rule made the label unique.
adjudication.why_not_rescore: The frozen v2 evaluator required one exact decision and residual pair per task. Treating neighboring decisions as equivalent after seeing the answer would be retrospective label expansion.

prospective_v3_requirements: Use a new protocol identity and obtain new action-time authority before submission.

Define every canonical decision class operationally and add a deterministic precedence rule, or prospectively declare acceptable decision sets where the scientific construct is consequence equivalence rather than exact lifecycle syntax.
Separate terminal eligibility from remediation action so block, hold, revert, and isolate cannot be confused with the residual that caused them.
Preserve the v2 canonical residual vocabulary unless a prospective change is justified; it matched 6/6 here.
Keep route detail and brief reason unscored, keep labels evaluator-only, close candidate bytes before label access, and retain the 5/6 schema and semantic floors plus zero evaluator disagreement.
Add adversarial cases that distinguish temporary hold, permanent denial, lifecycle rollback, and quarantine using explicit state and authority facts.
Do not open the difficulty sweep or confirmatory denominator unless the new instrument passes.
non_claims: This diagnosis does not change the v2 result.
Six exact residual matches do not establish governance reasoning quality, routing quality, usefulness, safety, rollback completeness, or general semantic reliability.
The three consequence-preserving explanations are a diagnosis of label ambiguity, not a retrospective correct-score increase.
No chapter support, publication, release, deployment, or external-action authority follows.
